RawFittingWindow.description:
Volume fitting window restricting the range used for FPHA hyperplane computation.

Absolute bounds (`volume_min_hm3` / `volume_max_hm3`) and percentile bounds
(`volume_min_percentile` / `volume_max_percentile`) are mutually exclusive:
set one pair or the other, not both for the same bound.

volume_max_hm3.description: Explicit maximum volume for fitting [hm³]. Mutually exclusive with `volume_max_percentile`.

volume_max_percentile.description: Maximum as a percentile of the operating range. Mutually exclusive with `volume_max_hm3`.

volume_min_hm3.description: Explicit minimum volume for fitting [hm³]. Mutually exclusive with `volume_min_percentile`.

volume_min_percentile.description: Minimum as a percentile of the operating range. Mutually exclusive with `volume_min_hm3`.

RawFphaConfig.description: Configuration for the FPHA production function model.

fitting_window.description: Optional volume fitting window for hyperplane computation. Absent or null = full operating range.

max_planes_per_hydro.description: Maximum number of planes per hydro after heuristic selection. Absent = algorithm default (10).

spillage_discretization_points.description: Number of spillage discretization points used when computing hyperplanes. Absent = algorithm default (5).

turbine_discretization_points.description: Number of turbine flow discretization points used when computing hyperplanes. Absent = algorithm default (5).

volume_discretization_points.description: Number of volume discretization points used when computing hyperplanes. Absent = algorithm default (5).

RawProductionModel.description:
Intermediate type for one hydro production model entry.

The `selection_mode` field acts as a discriminator for the union.
Depending on `selection_mode`, either `stage_ranges` or `default_model` + `seasons` fields are present.

oneOf.description: Stage-range selection: each stage maps to a model via explicit `[start, end]` ranges.

hydro_id.description: Hydro plant identifier. Must be unique within the file.

stage_ranges.description: Ordered list of stage range descriptors.

oneOf.description: Seasonal selection: each stage maps to a model via its season index.

default_model.description: Fallback model for seasons not listed in `seasons`. One of `"constant_productivity"`, `"linearized_head"`, or `"fpha"`.

hydro_id.description: Hydro plant identifier. Must be unique within the file.

RawSeasonConfig.description: Season-specific model descriptor for the `seasonal` selection mode.

fpha_config.description: FPHA configuration. Required when `model` is `"fpha"`. Absent or null otherwise.

productivity_override.description: Optional productivity override [MW/(m³/s)]. When present, replaces the entity's base `productivity_mw_per_m3s` for this season. Only valid for `"constant_productivity"` and `"linearized_head"` models. Must be positive when present.

season_id.description: Season index (0-based, matching the `stages.json` season map).

RawStageRange.description: Stage range descriptor for the `stage_ranges` selection mode.

end_stage_id.description: Last stage (inclusive) to which this entry applies. `null` = until end of horizon.

fpha_config.description: FPHA configuration. Required when `model` is `"fpha"`. Absent or null otherwise.

productivity_override.description: Optional productivity override [MW/(m³/s)]. When present, replaces the entity's base `productivity_mw_per_m3s` for this stage range. Only valid for `"constant_productivity"` and `"linearized_head"` models. Must be positive when present.

start_stage_id.description: First stage (inclusive) to which this entry applies. Must be <= `end_stage_id` when `end_stage_id` is set.

description:
Per-hydro production model configuration loaded from `system/hydro_production_models.json`.

Specifies how the hydro production function (HPF) model variant is selected for
each stage or season. Two selection modes are supported:

- `stage_ranges`: maps each stage to a model via explicit `[start, end]` intervals.
- `seasonal`: maps each stage to a model via its season index, with a fallback default.

Each hydro may appear at most once. Results are sorted by `hydro_id` ascending.

$schema.description: JSON schema URI — informational, not validated.

production_models.description: Array of per-hydro production model configurations. Each `hydro_id` must be unique.

title: RawProductionModelFile
